title: S1-T2 — Author scripts/verify-belt-config + test
description: Build scripts/verify-belt-config: parses config.mibera.yaml + config.yaml, asserts byte-identical field_selection/addresses/start_blocks for both belt contracts, exits non-zero on mismatch. Test-first: injected-mismatch test fails before script is done. Wire as build/CI gate. AC-11 (SDD 5.3).
close_reason: scripts/verify-belt-config.js + test/verify-belt-config.test.ts (9/9 pass) — gate passes real config, fails injected mismatch (AC-11)

title: Pre-existing: src/handlers/sf-vaults.ts fails tsc --noEmit
description: tsc --noEmit reports ~7 errors in src/handlers/sf-vaults.ts (TS2322/TS2551 — LatestVaultStrategy not on HandlerContext; strategyAddress object vs string). Surfaced when node_modules was hydrated to pnpm-lock.yaml (stale node_modules had typescript 5.2.2 + mocha; lockfile declares typescript 5.9.3). NOT introduced by indexer-belt-rebuild Sprint 1 — git status src/ is empty, tsc include is [src] only. sf-vaults = S&F Vault handler, an ARCHIVED/dead contract per the build spec. generated/ dir is dated Feb 15 (stale). S2-T3 build gate runs pnpm codegen first — codegen may resolve these if they are stale generated-type artifacts, else they are a real pre-existing handler bug. Out of scope for Sprint 1.

title: S1-T1 — Author config.mibera.yaml
description: HyperIndex config scoped to MiberaLiquidBacking (0xaa04F13994A7fCd86F3BbbF4054d239b88F2744d, start_block 3971122, 9 events) + MiberaCollection (0x6666397dfe9a8c469bf65dc744cb1c733416c420, start_block 3837808, Transfer). field_selection copied verbatim from config.yaml. AC-2 (PRD FR-1, SDD 3.1+5).
close_reason: config.mibera.yaml authored — 2 belt contracts, field_selection extracted verbatim, verified by verify-belt-config (AC-2)

title: Pre-existing: pnpm test unscoped + fatbera-core.test.ts uses removed chai
description: No vitest.config — pnpm test (vitest run) sweeps the whole repo (346 files incl. hundreds of .claude/ framework tests; 296 fail to collect). Separately, test/fatbera-core.test.ts imports chai, removed when the project migrated mocha->vitest, so it fails to collect. Both pre-existing. Fix: add vitest.config with include scoped to test/, and migrate or remove fatbera-core.test.ts (FatBera is an archived contract). Sprint-1 gate is pnpm verify:belt-config (clean) + pnpm test verify-belt-config (9/9). Out of scope for Sprint 1.
